verses.text: Jesuh Khrih' sawltak ahi dingin Pasian in a hong seh keimah Paul leh thu upna sungah i sanggam Timoti in, Korin khua-ah a om Pasian' pawlpi mite leh Akhaia gamsungah a om Pasian' mite khempeuh tungah lai ka hong khak uh hi
I Pa Pasian leh Topa Jesuh Khrih in note khempeuh tungah dikna leh nopsakna thupha hong tungsak ta hen.

sections.sectionTitle: A Thuak Khit Ciangin Paul' Lungdam Kohna

verses.text: Eite' Topa Jesuh Khrih' Pa ahi, hehpihna a nei Pa, i kisapna khempeuhah a hong huh Pasian in thupha ngah ta hen
Amah in kote' haksatna khempeuhah hong huh ahih manin, kote in zong Pasian' tung panin ka ngah uh tua huhna mah zangin haksatna a nam tuamtuam a thuakte ka huhsawn thei leuleu uh hi
Khrih hangin gimna tampi ka thuak uh mah bangin amah in zong kote tungah huhna tampi mah a hong pia hi

Kote in gimna ka thuak uh leh note' phattuamna ding leh hotkhiatna na ngahna ding uh ahi hi. Kote in huhna ka ngah uh leh zong, note zong a hong kihuh hi a, kote' thuak bang gimnate na thuak uh ciangin lungduai takin na thuakzawhna ding uh thahatna a hong kipia ahi hi
Note ka hong muan'na uh kiam tuanlo hi. Kote' thuak bangin na thuak uh leh Pasian in kote hong huh mah bangin note zong hong huh ding hi
Sanggamte aw, Asia gamsunga ka thuaknate uh na hong phawkpih ding uh ka deih uh hi. Ka thuakna uh lianlua mahmah ahih manin nuntak zawhna ding lametna omlo hi
A si ding taktak hi ta hang, ci-in ka kingaihsun uh hi. Ahi zongin tua zahin ka thuakna uh pen kote' thatang kimuang loin sihna panin misite a hingkiksak Pasian ka muan'theihna dingun a piang ahi hi
Tua zahin a lauhuai sihna ding panin hong honkhia khinzo a, zong hong honkhia lai ding hi. Mailam hunah zong hong honkhia kikkik ding hi, ci-in amah ka muang uh hi

Kote-a' dingin thu hong ngetsak un. Tua hi leh mi tampi in kote-a' dingin thu a hong ngetsaknate uh Pasian in a hong piakna hangin mi tampi mah in kote' tangdingin Pasian tungah lungdamna ko thei ding uh hi.

Kote' kisialhpih thu in: Hih leitunga ka gamtatnate uh leh a diakdiakin note tungah kong gamtatnate uhah, mihingte' pilna a zang hiloin Pasian hehpihna vang tawh, Pasian' deihna bangin lungsim takpi tawh a gamta hi ung, ci-in ka kitheihna lungsim uh ahi hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh note in simthei-in a thu na theihtheih dingte bek uh a hong gelh ka hi uh hi. Tuhunin a cingin na theihlohte uh zong
Topa Jesuh hong paikik Ni ciangin a cingtakin thei ding na hih manun note hangin ka kisialh uh mah bangin note zong kote hangin na kisial ding uh hi
Tu-a bangin piang taktak ding ci-in teltheih ka hih manin note in hamphatna nihvei na ngahna dingun ka geel a
Masedonia gam ka pai ciangin hong nawk masa-in, Masedonia gam panin ka kilehkik ciangin zong Judea gama ka paina dingah nong huh theihna dingun hong nawk leuleu dingin ka ngaihsun masa phot hi
Hih bangin ka ngaihsutna pen a mawkkheel themthum hong sa na hi uh hiam? Leitung mihingte bangin angsung phattuamna ding a om kei leh a gensa thu a kheel themthumte bang hong sa na hi uh hiam
Pasian a thuman a citak ahih mah bangin note tungah ka hong gente uh zong a kheel themthum ka hi kei uh hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh Silvanas, Timoti, leh keimah in note lakah a thu ka hong hilhhilh uh Pasian' Tapa Jesuh Khrih pen hih ding a cihte hihlo ding ci-in a thu a kheel themthumpa hilo a, hih ding a cihte hih ding mah hi pah hi
Pasian' thuciamte khempeuh a hihpa pen amah ahi hi. Tua ahih manin Jesuh Khrih hangin Pasian phatin, “Amen,” i cihna zong hih thu hang mah ahi hi
Khrih sungah kote leh note a hong kipsakpa, leh nasem dingin kote a hong sawlpa pen Pasian ahi hi

Amah in eite pen ama-a' ihihna ciamtehna eite tungah hong bawl a, ama-a' ihihna leh eite tungah a hong piakding na khempeuh a hong pia takpi ding ahihna a kitelna dingin eite' lungsim sungah Kha Siangtho a hong mapiak hi
Note kiangah kong pailohna pen note ka hong dopna hizaw hi. Hih thu hong theihpih ka teci pen Pasian ahi hi
Hih bangin um un, ci-in thatanghat thu tawh a hong gen ding ka hi kei uh hi. Note na upna uhah kipkhin na hih manun note' lungdamna dingin note tawh na a semkhawm ka hi uh hi.
